response.justification: Severe skill mismatch on mandatory requirements. The role demands 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows with SQL Server/Oracle expertise; the candidate has only 6 months of C++ experience (2015) and has spent the last decade in JavaScript/TypeScript web development. No fixed-income or investment-banking domain knowledge is evident. While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and communication skills, they lack the core technical prerequisites and financial-services domain exposure critical to this capital-markets role.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (14+ years) spanning multiple domains and languages demonstrates strong fundamentals and adaptability.
Excellent communication and teaching ability evidenced by workshops, talks, and educational contributions.
Some finance exposure (RIDE Capital) and Java development background provide partial domain and language overlap.
concerns: Severely limited C++ experience: only 6 months in 2015, with no recent work. Mandatory requirement is 5–10 years of hands-on C++.
No Windows platform development background; resume shows Linux and web-based focus. Mandatory requirement is strong C++ on Windows.
Missing mandatory domain expertise: no fixed-income, derivatives, investment-banking, or capital-markets experience beyond one tangential finance role.
